title: Mountain's Poem
description: A mod of many Chinese mythical animals
body:
_Thanks to Призмарин for the Russian translation_
# Main Introduction
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eab4275a6695f59ccd0c718795a7c7cfeaefe9d.png)
**Mountain's Poem** is a mod that immerses you in ancient Chinese books, where beautiful dragons and phoenixes dance for you if you love dazzling creatures, and cannibalistic beasts can become your right-hand men. If you love ancient bronze utensils and meals, the Bronze Jue will give you the original flavor that was once active and charming in this land, and the meat sauce carried in the Copper Dou will give you an endless mellow aroma.

## More Copper And More Adornments
You can choose to forge beautiful bronze objects, depict each creature with Lei teeth craver and Xuan tortoise shells, give the bronze unique forms and pattern through totem scrolls, and keep the most vivid moments of their lives alive, all under your control.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/556ae0efa4d7cae2c8c0f7e0806a57f8c73a317f.png)
## Sacrificial Ritual
You can also interact with the rare beasts in the mod in various ways to obtain some unique materials, or listen to the whispers of the gods through rigorous rituals, and when you start the ritual and summon the gods hidden between the mountains, dozens of sacrificial utensils and blocks in the mod will help you to enhance the solemnity and fun of the ritual.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba18c91db5457944cbebb8b23d0ee62ac754167.png)
## Art And Adventure
A large number of Chinese paintings and antique decorations can provide a comfortable environment for players, and new weapons and unique creatures can keep players exploring.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/263da3368a1f1f07f3d36661e50ee9a253abcf02.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d2c89d43d9a0d6a72f40eef9330464caaa106f.png)
